blocks.text: Cricket update: 'Jofra didn't bother' - Archer accepts his fate after run-out mistake. In their opening match of the 2026 men's Hundred, Southern Brave's Jofra Archer acknowledges he's going to be run out and accepts his fate by walking off, rather than attempting to make it back to the crease.
